subject: Sentret, a small brown ferret-like Pokemon with a striped ringed tail, standing alert in tall grass in a bright meadow
description: A small round-bodied mammal Pokemon with brown-and-cream coloring, large round dark eyes, and rounded ears. Its long tail with dark ring stripes is clearly visible. The creature stands upright in or among tall grass blades in a bright well-lit meadow. The pose is alert, consistent with the sentinel lookout behavior described in its flavor text. The background is bright green and light, giving a cheerful open-air meadow feel.
foreground: Small brown ferret-like Pokemon with striped tail standing upright in tall grass
background: Bright green meadow with tall grass blades and light sky
emotion: alert and watchful — upright posture, wide eyes scanning the surroundings
